# CellOracle Demo Derived Outputs

This directory keeps the lightweight, reusable outputs from the CellOracle
Paul2015 demo regression workflow.

Tracked files:

- `celloracle_paul2015_ridge_grn.csv`
  - Expression-supported GRN exported in NVSim-compatible edge format.
- `celloracle_paul2015_master_regulators.txt`
  - Selected master-regulator candidates from the exported GRN.
- `celloracle_paul2015_mr_production.csv`
  - Simple state-wise master-regulator production profile for later NVSim use.
- `summary.json`
  - Quick regression summary and retained output paths.

Not tracked in git:

- `raw/`
  - Local mirror of the CellOracle demo raw files.
- `base_edges.csv`
- `global_target_prediction_metrics.csv`
- `cluster_target_prediction_metrics.csv`
- `skipped_targets.csv`
- `figures/`

These files are generated by `scripts/celloracle_demo_regression.py` and can be
recreated locally when needed.

Raw data sources used by the script:

- `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/morris-lab/CellOracle/master/celloracle/data/anndata/Paul_etal_v202204.h5ad`
- `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/morris-lab/CellOracle/master/celloracle/data/TFinfo_data/mm9_mouse_atac_atlas_data_TSS_and_cicero_0.9_accum_threshold_10.5_DF_peaks_by_TFs_v202204.parquet`

Important note:

- The CellOracle base GRN does not contain experimentally validated
  activation/repression signs.
- Any exported NVSim `sign` from this workflow is regression-derived rather than
  biological ground truth.
